## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify roles and align on content strategy for Tribe AI and GrowthX Labs partnership](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Misalignment on meeting purpose: Expected CMS walkthrough, but Kendra lacks publishing access](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Andrej presented initial content strategy draft with 50 topics, including new articles and content audits](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Kendra's role: Drafting case studies and content pieces, but not publishing](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Next steps: Schedule weekly sync, share draft content, and connect with CMS expert](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

## Topics

### Role Clarification and Partnership Overview

  - [Andrej: New content manager for Tribe AI at GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Sadira: Explained GrowthX Labs' role in generating AI content, refreshing old content, and producing new pieces](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Kendra: Consultant since January, focusing on client interviews and case studies (6-11 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Misunderstanding: Kendra expected to receive info, team expected her to present CMS walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

### Content Strategy Presentation

  - [Andrej shared initial draft for first 50 topics](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Strategy includes:](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Content templates for topic clusters (e.g., "How to apply AI to solve X in Y industry")](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Industries covered: crypto, education, finance, healthcare, insurance, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [Mix of template-based and diverse standalone topics](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Recommendation: 50/50 split between new content and optimizing existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Suggested 10 articles/week: 5 new, 5 optimized](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Optimize top-performing articles that may have dropped in rankings](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Current Content Development Process

  - [Kendra drafting case studies (6-11 pages) from client interviews](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Also working on content needs established by Tribe AI (e.g., reference architectures, use case determination)](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [All content currently in draft state, pending approval from Tribe AI team](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Access and Analytics

  - [GrowthX Labs has access to Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Kendra recently gained website access but hasn't published content](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Team needs CMS walkthrough from appropriate Tribe AI team member](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Identify and connect with Tribe AI team member for CMS walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Schedule weekly sync meeting with both teams to discuss content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wp1uf6-XmoCHoN8m4Q7Z4grvgzQK7qNZ?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
